creator: kargl@troutmask.apl.washington.edu
text:
Remove /usr/ports/hungarian.
portmaster editor/libreoffice

-----------------------------------------------------------------------
        Oh dear - something failed during the build - sorry !
  For more help with debugging build errors, please see the section in:
            http://wiki.documentfoundation.org/Development

  internal build errors:

ERROR: error 65280 occurred while making /usr/ports/editors/libreoffice/work/libreoffice-build-3.3.2.2/build/libreoffice/hunspell

 it seems that the error is inside 'hunspell', please re-run build
 inside this module to isolate the error and/or test your fix:
-----------------------------------------------------------------------

/usr/local/bin/bash
cd /usr/ports/editors/libreoffice/work/libreoffice-build-3.3.2.2/build/libreoffice
source ./FreeBSDAMDEnv.Set.sh
cd hunspell
build

IMHO, it seems silly to require a spell checker for a language
that less than 1% of the world population speaks.

Fix: 

Don't know.
How-To-Repeat: 
See above
